extDescription.message: Hover over images to quickly save them to your downloads folder

experimentalHelp.message: Experimental modes for more restrictive sites. YMMV.

visualFeedbackHelp.message: Show border around images when hovering

allowedExtensionsHelp.message: Comma-separated list of allowed file extensions

minImageSizeHelp.message: Minimum width/height for images to be detected (50-1000px)

convertWebpToPngHelp.message: Automatically convert WebP images to PNG format for better compatibility

longHideDelayHelp.message: Prevents button from disappearing instantly on problematic video players

saveSubfolderHelp.message: Save images to a subfolder inside Downloads. Leave empty to save directly in Downloads.

manageExclusionsHelp.message: Configure domains where the extension should not work

resetAllSettingsHelp.message: Reset all settings to default values. This action cannot be undone.

bulkDownloadHelp.message: Gallery opens images in a new tab. ZIP downloads all images as a compressed file.

statusModeCanvas.message: Download mode set to: Canvas extraction

statusBorderSaveFailed.message: Failed to save border highlight setting

statusMinSizeInvalid.message: Please enter a value between 50 and 1000 pixels

statusWebpPngFailed.message: Failed to save WebP conversion setting

statusSubfolderDirect.message: Images will save directly to Downloads

statusNoImages.message: No images found on this page

statusContentScriptError.message: Failed to communicate with page content script

statusResetDone.message: All settings have been reset to default values

confirmReset.message: Are you sure you want to reset all settings to default values? This action cannot be undone.

galleryTip.message: 💡 Browse and open images. Use filters to find what you need, then click "Open in New Tab" to view/save images.

galleryCorsWarning.message: ⚠️ CORS Limitations: This gallery ZIP download uses the fetch method and faces CORS restrictions. For better download success rates, use the ZIP download button in the extension popup instead - it runs with extension permissions and may allow download more images.

galleryFooterLine1.message: 📄 This is a temporary auto-generated gallery page created by the Image Hover Save extension v{version}

galleryFooterLine2.message: This page will be lost when closed. Do all downloads you need before you close the page.

multiPathHelp.message: Each path shows as separate button. Normal mode only.

statusPathEmpty.message: Name and folder cannot be empty

manageStrategiesHelp.message: Configure regex rules to download original images directly from thumbnails on hover

exclusionsSubtitle.message: Configure domains where Image Hover Save should not work

exclusionsHelp.message: Add domains where you don't want the extension to work. Use specific domains like "apps.domain.com" to exclude only that domain, or use "domain.com" to exclude all subdomains. When you visit an excluded domain, the extension will not show download buttons on images.

exclusionsExample1.message: example.com - Excludes example.com and all subdomains (a.example.com, b.example.com, etc.)

exclusionsExample2.message: app.example.com - Excludes app.example.com and its subdomains, but won't exclude example.com

exclusionsExample3.message: google.com - Good for avoiding conflicts with Google's own image features

exclusionsSync.message: ☁️ Settings will be synced across your devices

exclusionsSyncStatus.message: ☁️ Settings will be synced across your devices
